---
title: TIGER Roads
date: '2026-03-21'
description: US Census TIGER Roads in GEE
categories:
- Geospatial
- Data Science
featured: true
---

[View Catalog](https://gee-community-catalog.org/projects/tiger_roads/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

The U.S. Census TIGER roads dataset made accessible in Google Earth Engine for large-scale geospatial analysis. Analyze road networks, transportation patterns, and infrastructure across the entire United States.
